name: risk_gate_fix
public_artifact_policy: sanitized only; full bars, returns, equity, and per-candidate details stay in private aegis-strategies/incubating/olympus47b
old_gate_removed: alpha fdr_discovery over excess-return/sign p-values is no longer a RISK_IMPROVED hard gate
new_gate_added: paired block-bootstrap risk-difference CI plus Benjamini-Hochberg FDR over risk-difference p-values

decision_gate.costs: fee and slippage charged on turnover
decision_gate.risk_difference_ci: 5% lower CI bound > 0 for drawdown reduction, Calmar difference, and Sortino difference
decision_gate.multiple_testing: Benjamini-Hochberg FDR at alpha=0.10 over predeclared risk-difference tests

bootstrap.method: paired block bootstrap on locked-OOS strategy-vs-benchmark returns
